title: When NOT to use agents — high-stakes or irreversible actions require human oversight
session_name: RAG, Vectors, Agents and Production AI

course.title: Python for AI, PE, VC and RAG

artifact_plan.diagram_intent: HITL approval flow: agent proposes action → human reviews → approve/reject → execute or halt. Optionally show autonomy spectrum as a secondary panel (manual→HITL→human-on-loop→autonomous).
profile_signals: 5 sub-concepts in Core Concepts each requiring definition
HITL approval loop is a branching/cycle flow — strong diagram signal
autonomy spectrum is a contrast/scale — additional diagram signal
